agent: hfd.constitution

Revise docs/constitution.md for this ML project. Make surgical edits, check
cascading impacts on downstream artifacts, and update the revision
history.

Context the user should provide:
- What changed and which sections need revision
- Whether to check downstream impacts ("verify downstream")
- Whether glossary terms need reconciliation
